title: useTouch
description: Detects and tracks touch events like tap, swipe, and long press on mobile devices.
summary: Hook for touch gesture detection and tracking.

`,(0,t.jsx)(o,{name:"use-touch",code:`"use client";\r
import React from "react";\r
\r
interface UseTouchProps {\r
  touch?: boolean;\r
  open?: boolean;\r
  defaultOpen?: boolean;\r
  onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void;\r
}\r
\r
export function useTouch<T extends HTMLElement>(_touch: UseTouchProps) {\r
  const { touch = true, defaultOpen = false, onOpenChange, open: openChange } = _touch;\r
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = React.useState(defaultOpen);\r
\r
  const triggerRef = React.useRef<T>(null);\r
  const open = openChange !== undefined ? openChange : isOpen;\r
  const setOpen = onOpenChange !== undefined ? onOpenChange : setIsOpen;\r
\r
  const [isTouchDevice, setIsTouchDevice] = React.useState(false);\r
\r
  React.useEffect(() => {\r
    const el = triggerRef.current;\r
    const onMouseEnter = () => {\r
      if (!isTouchDevice) setOpen(true);\r
    };\r
    const onMouseLeave = () => {\r
      if (!isTouchDevice) setOpen(false);\r
    };\r
    const onMouseMove = () => {\r
      if (isTouchDevice) setIsTouchDevice(false);\r
    };\r
    const onTouchStart = () => {\r
      if (!isTouchDevice) setIsTouchDevice(true);\r
      setOpen(true);\r
    };\r
    const onTouchEnd = () => {\r
      setOpen(false);\r
    };\r
\r
    const windowTouchStart = () => {\r
      if (!isTouchDevice) setIsTouchDevice(true);\r
    };\r
\r
    if (el) {\r
      // if touch active\r
      if (touch) {\r
        el.addEventListener("touchstart", onTouchStart);\r
        el.addEventListener("touchend", onTouchEnd);\r
      }\r
\r
      window.addEventListener("touchstart", windowTouchStart);\r
      window.addEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);\r
\r
      el.addEventListener("mouseenter", onMouseEnter);\r
      el.addEventListener("mouseleave", onMouseLeave);\r
      el.addEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);\r
    }\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      if (el) {\r
        // if touch active\r
        if (touch) {\r
          el.removeEventListener("touchstart", onTouchStart);\r
          el.removeEventListener("touchend", onTouchEnd);\r
        }\r
\r
        window.removeEventListener("touchstart", windowTouchStart);\r
        window.removeEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);\r
\r
        el.removeEventListener("mouseenter", onMouseEnter);\r
        el.removeEventListener("mouseleave", onMouseLeave);\r
        el.removeEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);\r
      }\r
    };\r
  }, [isTouchDevice, setOpen, triggerRef, touch]);\r
\r
  return { touch, open, triggerRef };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-touch.ts"})]})}function h(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,t.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,t.jsx)(l,{...n})}):l(n)}function L(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return E(x);})();
